_comment: Frontier-lab AI researcher transfers. Curated by hand. Each entry is a NAMED, publicly-reported move. fee = reported/rumored comp (mark rumored:true if disputed). Keep it accurate — every row should be defensible with a source link.

transfers.name: John Jumper
transfers.title: Nobel laureate, AlphaFold co-creator
transfers.note: Marquee signing. Nobel Prize in Chemistry 2024 for AlphaFold. Confirmed via his own X post.

transfers.name: Andrej Karpathy
transfers.title: Founding OpenAI member, ex-Tesla AI
transfers.note: One of the most-followed names in AI. Date approximate.

transfers.name: Ross Nordeen
transfers.title: Last of xAI's 11 co-founders to leave
transfers.note: Completes the unwind of xAI's founding team. Date approximate.

transfers.name: Andrew Tulloch
transfers.title: Thinking Machines Lab co-founder
transfers.note: Headline package reported at ~$1.5B over 6 years. Meta called the figure "inaccurate and ridiculous" — treat as rumored.

transfers.name: Barret Zoph
transfers.title: Returned to OpenAI
transfers.note: Part of a cluster move back to OpenAI from Thinking Machines Lab.

transfers.name: Luke Metz
transfers.title: ex-OpenAI, ex-Thinking Machines Lab
transfers.note: Returned to OpenAI alongside Zoph and Schoenholz.

transfers.name: Sam Schoenholz
transfers.title: ex-Google Brain, ex-Thinking Machines Lab
transfers.note: Third of the Thinking Machines Lab cluster to rejoin OpenAI.

transfers.name: Devendra Chaplot
transfers.title: ex-Mistral, ex-Thinking Machines Lab
transfers.note: Thinking Machines Lab continues to bleed talent in multiple directions.

transfers.name: Jan Leike
transfers.title: Former OpenAI superalignment co-lead
transfers.note: The move that arguably opened the transfer window. Left over safety priorities.

transfers.name: Ilya Sutskever
transfers.title: OpenAI co-founder & ex-chief scientist
transfers.note: Left OpenAI in May 2024 and co-founded Safe Superintelligence in June 2024; later its CEO.

transfers.name: Mira Murati
transfers.title: Former OpenAI CTO
transfers.note: Departed OpenAI as CTO in Sept 2024 and founded Thinking Machines Lab in Feb 2025.

transfers.name: John Schulman
transfers.title: OpenAI co-founder, PPO/RLHF
transfers.note: Left OpenAI for Anthropic in Aug 2024 to focus on alignment.

transfers.name: John Schulman
transfers.title: OpenAI co-founder, PPO/RLHF
transfers.note: Left Anthropic after ~6 months to become chief scientist at Thinking Machines Lab.

transfers.name: Tim Brooks
transfers.title: Sora co-creator
transfers.note: Sora co-creator left OpenAI for world models & multimodal generation in Gemini.

transfers.name: Noam Shazeer
transfers.title: Transformer co-author
transfers.note: Google licensed Character.AI tech (~$2.7B) and Shazeer rejoined Google to co-lead Gemini.

transfers.name: Lucas Beyer
transfers.title: ViT / SigLIP co-creator
transfers.note: Left DeepMind Zurich to co-found OpenAI's Zurich office with Kolesnikov and Zhai.

transfers.name: Alexander Kolesnikov
transfers.title: ViT / BiT / SigLIP
transfers.note: Left DeepMind Zurich to co-found OpenAI's Zurich office.

transfers.name: Xiaohua Zhai
transfers.title: SigLIP / PaliGemma lead
transfers.note: Left DeepMind Zurich to co-found OpenAI's Zurich office.

transfers.name: Alexandr Wang
transfers.title: Scale AI co-founder
transfers.note: Became Meta's Chief AI Officer leading Meta Superintelligence Labs; Meta took a ~49% stake in Scale AI.

transfers.name: Nat Friedman
transfers.title: Former GitHub CEO
transfers.note: Joined Meta to co-lead Meta Superintelligence Labs on AI products and applied research.

transfers.name: Daniel Gross
transfers.title: SSI co-founder, ex-Apple AI
transfers.note: Left Safe Superintelligence to join Meta Superintelligence Labs as Friedman's product counterpart.

transfers.name: Lilian Weng
transfers.title: ex-OpenAI VP, Research & Safety
transfers.note: Left OpenAI after ~7 years to co-found Thinking Machines Lab.

transfers.name: Durk Kingma
transfers.title: OpenAI co-founder · Adam, VAE
transfers.note: OpenAI co-founder (Adam optimizer, VAE) joined Anthropic.

transfers.name: David Silver
transfers.title: AlphaGo / AlphaZero lead
transfers.note: Left DeepMind to found Ineffable Intelligence (world-models superintelligence; ~$1.1B seed).

transfers.name: Trapit Bansal
transfers.title: o1 reasoning contributor
transfers.note: Foundational o1 reasoning contributor joined Meta Superintelligence Labs.

transfers.name: Shengjia Zhao
transfers.title: Meta MSL chief scientist
transfers.note: ChatGPT/GPT-4 contributor; named chief scientist of Meta Superintelligence Labs.

transfers.name: Jiahui Yu
transfers.title: ex-OpenAI Perception lead
transfers.note: Led OpenAI's multimodal Perception team before Meta.

transfers.name: Hongyu Ren
transfers.title: GPT-4o contributor
transfers.note: GPT-4o + o-mini contributor; led OpenAI post-training.

transfers.name: Shuchao Bi
transfers.title: GPT-4o voice co-creator
transfers.note: Co-created GPT-4o voice mode; joined Meta Superintelligence Labs.

transfers.name: Ruoming Pang
transfers.title: ex-Apple foundation models head
transfers.note: Apple's foundation-models head left for Meta (reported $200M+ package).

transfers.name: Arthur Mensch
transfers.title: Mistral AI co-founder & CEO
transfers.note: Left DeepMind to co-found and lead Mistral AI.
